label: Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA

node.label: Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA
node.definition: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning adapts a frozen or mostly frozen model through small trainable modules; LoRA learns low-rank updates to selected weight matrices.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA is to connect Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning, Linear algebra to downstream capabilities including Large language models, Code models, copilots & repository intelligence, Model merging & weight-space composition.
examples: substrate for Code models, copilots & repository intelligence
substrate for Model merging & weight-space composition
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning, Linear algebra.

dependencies.rationale: Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA uses Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA uses Linear algebra as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA uses Affine transforms & dense layers as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
